shared_properties: The backdrop covers the full 1920x1080 frame and defines the monochrome winter mood for the settlement.
A central basin composition keeps the village readable inside the fixed camera view described by the GDD.
The horizon and mountain masses remain low-detail so gameplay layers can sit clearly above them.
differences: This scene establishes the snow-blown valley, distant cliffs, and settlement footprint for the entire run.
The center lane stays slightly brighter than the side cliffs so buildings and overlays remain legible.
Drift ridges and wind streaks guide the eye toward the village core without creating interactable confusion.

reference_images.label: jarl_of_blizzard_gdd
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the winter survival loop, queue-memory mechanic, building roster, and 1920x1080 Bevy target.

reference_images.label: jarl_of_blizzard_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the monochrome blizzard mood, Viking settlement silhouettes, and snow density targets.

reference_images.label: jarl_of_blizzard_village_scene
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the settlement composition, building spacing, and whiteout layering over the frozen basin.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Full-screen SpriteBundle background rendered behind every settlement tile, building, and weather overlay.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load world/art_000009.png during world boot and keep it active across planning, memory, execution, and result phases.
runtime_notes: Place the backdrop at the farthest world depth with no parallax so the fixed camera never reveals empty space.
Bake wind streaks into the texture to preserve deterministic capture and replay behavior.
Keep the brightest snow field behind the playable village center rather than at the frame edge.

context.usage: Primary landscape layer that frames the settlement, distant cliffs, and blizzard lanes under a fixed camera.

shape.silhouette: Wide frozen basin with a bright village center, dark cliff shoulders, and wind-carved snow ridges.

acceptance_criteria: PNG canvas is exactly 1920x1080px with the village focus area centered horizontally.
The central basin remains brighter than the outer cliff shoulders to support building readability.
No painted edge resembles a clickable UI panel or passable corridor.
